languages.text: When moving in combat leave trail of oiled ground for 2 rounds. Enemies, entering oiled ground must pass a AGI +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} (minimum 0) check or fall prone. Allies can move through oiled ground for free. Oiled ground is consumed upon use.

traits.locale_text: When moving in combat leave trail of oiled ground for 2 rounds. Enemies, entering oiled ground must pass a AGI +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} (minimum 0) check or fall prone. Allies can move through oiled ground for free. Oiled ground is consumed upon use.

languages.text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Allies spend no {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} when moving through oiled cells. When a creature enters it, the oil is removed from the cell.
languages.original_text: When moving in combat leave trail of oiled ground for 2 rounds. Enemies, entering oiled ground must pass a AGI +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} (minimum 0) check or fall prone. Allies can move through oiled ground for free. Oiled ground is consumed upon use.

traits.locale_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area consisting of all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 rounds.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an Agility resistance test with a +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} bonus (minimum 0) or fall prone. Allies spend no MP when moving through oiled cells. When a unit enters it, the oil is removed from the cell.

During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area consisting of all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 rounds.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an Agility resistance test with a +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} bonus (minimum 0) or fall prone. Allies spend no MP when moving through oiled cells. When a unit enters it, the oil is removed from the cell.

During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Allies spend no {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} when moving through oiled cells. When a unit enters it, the oil is removed from the cell.

During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 rounds.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an Agility resistance test with a +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} bonus (minimum 0) or fall prone. Allies spend no MP when moving through oiled cells. When a unit enters it, the oil is removed from the cell.

During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Allies spend no {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} when moving through oiled cells. When a unit enters it, the oil is removed from the cell.

languages.text:
Во время перемещения в бою обладатель аугмента оставляет за собой масляную область во всех клетках, через которые проходит. Эта область существует 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}.
Когда противник перемещается в нее, он проходит проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} на{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} с {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}бонусом{/g} +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} (минимум 0). При провале проверки противник оказывается {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокинут{/g} Союзники не тратят {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g} при перемещении через залитые маслом клетки. Когда существо перемещается в клетку, масло из нее исчезает.
languages.original_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Allies spend no {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} when moving through oiled cells. When a unit enters it, the oil is removed from the cell.

traits.locale_text:
Во время перемещения в бою обладатель аугмента оставляет за собой масляную область во всех клетках, через которые проходит. Эта область существует 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}.
Когда противник перемещается в нее, он проходит проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} на{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} с {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}бонусом{/g} +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} (минимум 0). При провале проверки противник оказывается {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокинут{/g} Союзники не тратят {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g} при перемещении через залитые маслом клетки. Когда существо перемещается в клетку, масло из нее исчезает.

Во время перемещения в бою обладатель аугмента оставляет за собой масляную область во всех клетках, через которые проходит. Эта область существует 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}.
Когда противник перемещается в нее, он проходит проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} на{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} с {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}бонусом{/g} +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} (минимум 0). При провале проверки противник оказывается {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокинут{/g} Союзники не тратят {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g} при перемещении через залитые маслом клетки. Когда существо перемещается в клетку, масло из нее исчезает.

languages.text:
Cuando se mueve en combate, el usuario crea una zona cubierta de aceite en todas las casillas que recorre. Esta zona dura 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asaltos{/g}.
Cuando un enemigo entra en ella, debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilidad{/g} con una {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonificación{/g} de +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} (mínimo 0) o será {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}derribado{/g}. Los aliados no gastan {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PM{/g} cuando se mueven por casillas cubiertas de aceite. Cuando una unidad entra en una de estas casillas, el aceite desaparece.
languages.original_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Allies spend no {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} when moving through oiled cells. When a unit enters it, the oil is removed from the cell.

traits.locale_text:
Cuando se mueve en combate, el usuario crea una zona cubierta de aceite en todas las casillas que recorre. Esta zona dura 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asaltos{/g}.
Cuando un enemigo entra en ella, debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilidad{/g} con una {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonificación{/g} de +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} (mínimo 0) o será {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}derribado{/g}. Los aliados no gastan {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PM{/g} cuando se mueven por casillas cubiertas de aceite. Cuando una unidad entra en una de estas casillas, el aceite desaparece.

languages.text: Während er sich im Kampf bewegt, erzeugt der Nutzer einen Ölfilm auf allen Feldern, die er passiert. Der Bereich bleibt 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runden{/g} lang bestehen.Betritt ihn ein Gegner, muss er eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}Bonus{/g} von +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} bestehen (min. 0), um nicht {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}hingestreckt{/g} auf den Boden zu fallen. Verbündete verbrauchen auf ölbedeckten Feldern keine {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g}. Betritt eine Einheit ein entsprechendes Feld, wird es vom Öl befreit.

When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Der Bereich bleibt 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runden{/g} lang bestehen.Betritt ihn ein Gegner, muss er eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}Bonus{/g} von +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} bestehen (min. 0), um nicht {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}hingestreckt{/g} auf den Boden zu fallen. Verbündete verbrauchen auf ölbedeckten Feldern keine {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g}. Betritt eine Einheit ein entsprechendes Feld, wird es vom Öl befreit.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, çatışmada hareket ederken geçtiği tüm hücrelerde yağla kaplı bir alan oluşturur. Bu alan, 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} boyunca kalır.
Bir düşman bu alana girdiğinde +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonusa{/g} (minimum 0) sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Çeviklik{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}yere devrilir{/g}. Dost birimler, yağa bulanmış hücrelerden geçerken {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}HP{/g} harcamaz. Bir birim bu alana girdiğinde o hücredeki yağ ortadan kalkar.

During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Allies spend no {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} when moving through oiled cells. When a unit enters it, the oil is removed from the cell.

Bir düşman bu alana girdiğinde +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonusa{/g} (minimum 0) sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Çeviklik{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}yere devrilir{/g}. Dost birimler, yağa bulanmış hücrelerden geçerken {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}HP{/g} harcamaz. Bir birim bu alana girdiğinde o hücredeki yağ ortadan kalkar.

languages.text:
Lorsqu'il se déplace en situation de combat, l'utilisateur laisse sur toutes les cases qu'il traverse une nappe d'huile qui dure 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
Lorsqu'un ennemi pénètre dans la zone, il doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilité{/g} avec un {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} de +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} (minimum 0). En cas d'échec, il subit l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}Paralysie{/g}. Les alliés ne dépensent pas de {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PD{/g} lorsqu'ils se déplacent sur des cases couvertes d'huile. Toute case affectée sur laquelle une unité vient se placer est aussitôt débarrassée de son huile.
languages.original_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Allies spend no {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} when moving through oiled cells. When a unit enters it, the oil is removed from the cell.

traits.locale_text:
Lorsqu'il se déplace en situation de combat, l'utilisateur laisse sur toutes les cases qu'il traverse une nappe d'huile qui dure 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
Lorsqu'un ennemi pénètre dans la zone, il doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilité{/g} avec un {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} de +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} (minimum 0). En cas d'échec, il subit l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}Paralysie{/g}. Les alliés ne dépensent pas de {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PD{/g} lorsqu'ils se déplacent sur des cases couvertes d'huile. Toute case affectée sur laquelle une unité vient se placer est aussitôt débarrassée de son huile.

languages.text:
在战斗中移动时，使用者在其经过的所有格子里创造一片覆油区域。该区域持续2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
敌人进入覆油区域时，必须通过一项有{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43}{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}加值{/g}（最低为0）的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，否则就会陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}倒地{/g}状态。盟友经过覆油格子时不消耗{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}移动点数{/g}。当有单位进入覆油区域时，清除该格的油污。
languages.original_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Allies spend no {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} when moving through oiled cells. When a unit enters it, the oil is removed from the cell.

traits.locale_text:
在战斗中移动时，使用者在其经过的所有格子里创造一片覆油区域。该区域持续2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
敌人进入覆油区域时，必须通过一项有{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43}{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}加值{/g}（最低为0）的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，否则就会陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}倒地{/g}状态。盟友经过覆油格子时不消耗{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}移动点数{/g}。当有单位进入覆油区域时，清除该格的油污。

languages.text:
戦闘中の移動時、使用者は通過したすべてのマスに油まみれの領域を生成する。この領域は2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}持続する。
敵がそこに入ると、+{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43}の{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}ボーナス{/g}（最低0）を伴う{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抵抗判定{/g}に成功しなければ{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}伏せ状態{/g}になる。味方は油のマスを通過する際に{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}を消費しない。ユニットがそこに入ると、そのマスから油が除去される。
languages.original_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Allies spend no {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} when moving through oiled cells. When a unit enters it, the oil is removed from the cell.

traits.locale_text:
戦闘中の移動時、使用者は通過したすべてのマスに油まみれの領域を生成する。この領域は2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}持続する。
敵がそこに入ると、+{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43}の{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}ボーナス{/g}（最低0）を伴う{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抵抗判定{/g}に成功しなければ{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}伏せ状態{/g}になる。味方は油のマスを通過する際に{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}を消費しない。ユニットがそこに入ると、そのマスから油が除去される。
